title: Panel 2 Diplomatic Dialogue: Peace through Development and Cooperation or Annihilation?
description: Harley Schlanger moderates a discussion entitled the Strategic Crisis Facing the Human Race. Wil we have Peace through Development and Cooperation or Annihilation? Speakers include Helga Zepp-LaRouche (Founder of the Schiller Institute), Amb. Ping Huang (Council General of the Peoples Republic of China in New York), Alexey Boguslavskiy (First Secretary, Russian Federation Mission to the UN), and Dr. Bouthaina Shaaban (Political and Media Advisor to the Syrian President)
